subject: Reminder: February Expense Reports Due March 5th
body:
Dear Team,

End of month is quickly approaching. This is a friendly reminder to please submit your February expense reports by March 5th, 2026.

Accurate and timely expense report submissions are essential for our financial planning and record-keeping. Please ensure all business expenses are documented and submitted before the deadline.

If you have any questions about the submission process or need assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Internal Communications
